title: Final scene EoE how to make sense of it
display_title: Final scene EoE how to make sense of it
wikitext:
[]: Final scene EoE, how to make sense of it.             Quote Post by Moon » Wed May 11, 2011 11:04 am I have watched the series on more than one occasion, then went back after watching EoE to the series and scanned through scenes replaying them along side others. I had a mass of video content open for days and even went so far as to take notes on episode numbers and time for important scenes. I have read a mass of articles and forums involving what others opinions were on the series and while it seems eva was created with multiple understandings in mind, one thing has bothered me, and that is the final scene with Asuka and Shinji. while looking back I noticed a few things which I am remembering from over a year back now, as I have not recently watched the old series nor do I intend to unless of course it airs on national free to air, this is due in part to a resurfacing of feelings of confusion coupled with a burning desire to understand what Hideaki Anno was trying to portray in his anime creation. I'll get the the point, and that is Asuka in the final scene while looking like her never felt like it was actually her. Asuka's reaction to Shinji strangling her was completely out of character, not only this but the ghostly presence of Rei was absent at the time of her death and the fact that she is bandaged in the same way that Rei 2 was leads me to believe that it is in fact Asuka's body with a different soul within. I don't know what soul was used in Rei 2 or 3, however it is my understanding that Rei 1 was a combination of lilith's soul and yui's souless body. Understand this may better help my understanding of who Asuka in the EoE really is. While different scenes about Rei and Shinji lead me to believe at first that Rei had taken on Asuka's body, as Shinji had you know what to Asuka's pratically lifeless body, and the fact that an Angel called Rei "selfish" I think it was that she wanted Shinji to herself. But the fact that she caress's his face exactly the same way his mother did only moments before, Shinji breaking down and the words how disgusting being so relevant in that kind of situation leads me to believe that the worst case senario to be most relevant, on top of this wouldn't lilith occupy the original body even if it was a clone, being eva unit 01 forcing; Yui's soul out to occupy a body that could clearly not be her's as it was a giant mascred corpse in the background. Please some one prove this interpretaion wrong as that kind of ending makes me feel disgusting, not the way I want to remember a land mark anime for me in my adolecent years. I thank anybody in advance for taking the time to read my poorly edited post and I look forward to all intelligent replys.
